title: Uchigatanas-pack
description: Not official resourcepack for uchigatanas from Epic Fight
body:
**NOT OFFICIAL** resourcepack for uchigatanas from [Epic Fight](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight)

To get the result, just rename

List of available names:
- Astraledge
- Deahsin
- Demonblade
- Glasord
- Rivsblood
- Weser

**Optifine** is required for operation.

Do not distribute this set under your own name, do not present it as an official addition, the author wanted to diversify the cool weapons from the cool mod a little.
